utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final package includes all 6 of these items. Each is fully specified with detailed information: 
1) destination: Prague, Czech Republic — specified.
2) travel_dates: 2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05 — specific dates provided.
3) transportation: includes flight details (airline, class, dates, cost, baggage, cancellation) — fully detailed.
4) accommodation: includes hotel name, type, stars, location, room type, price, total cost, amenities — fully detailed.
5) activities: includes list of activities, duration, total cost, guide, booking requirement — fully detailed.
6) additional_services: includes dining details with restaurant name, type, cuisine, cost, reservation — fully detailed.
7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, payment date, cancellation deadline — fully covered.
Hence all 6 required items are included and fully specified.
